[{"node": {"avatar_large": "https://cdn.v2ex.com/navatar/6e27/13a6/557_large.png?m=1747623425", "name": "life", "avatar_normal": "https://cdn.v2ex.com/navatar/6e27/13a6/557_normal.png?m=1747623425", "title": "生活", "url": "https://www.v2ex.com/go/life", "topics": 11165, "footer": "", "header": "生活中的技术讨论", "title_alternative": "Life", "avatar_mini": "https://cdn.v2ex.com/navatar/6e27/13a6/557_mini.png?m=1747623425", "stars": 2376, "founder_id": 0, "aliases": [], "root": false, "id": 557, "parent_node_name": ""}, "member": {"id": 115028, "username": "weberCd", "url": "https://www.v2ex.com/u/weberCd", "website": null, "twitter": null, "psn": null, "github": null, "btc": null, "location": null, "tagline": null, "bio": null, "avatar_mini": "https://cdn.v2ex.com/gravatar/7e72d865d48d685d8e1468d49e5a5223?s=24&d=retro", "avatar_normal": "https://cdn.v2ex.com/gravatar/7e72d865d48d685d8e1468d49e5a5223?s=48&d=retro", "avatar_large": "https://cdn.v2ex.com/gravatar/7e72d865d48d685d8e1468d49e5a5223?s=73&d=retro", "created": 1430712890, "last_modified": 1782789707, "pro": 0}, "last_reply_by": "cxe2v", "last_touched": 1782871292, "title": "经济下行，我做了这些事情来节省开支，然后发现对生活品质几乎没有影响……欢迎补充", "url": "https://www.v2ex.com/t/1223876", "created": 1782789753, "deleted": 0, "content": "1.电信宽带降资费； 3 年合约期到了，我把电信宽带从 239/月降到了 109/月的低配套餐，无非就是带宽变小了，免费通话和赠送流量变少了，低配套餐实际使用下来，毫无体感上的区别；各地区政策可能不同，甚至携号转网换运营商可能省得更多。 2.短途出行主要骑车或地铁，开车变少了。老油车了，油价高。久了习惯了，反而不想开车了，开支比公共交通更大，停车之类的也很麻烦。 3.各类 App 的会员是越开越少了，而且是尽量和老婆共用 1 个会员。 4.MacBook/iPhone 都主要考虑二手的了，特别是较老款的高配版，性价比很高；而且再次置换的时候，二手换二手，成本更低了。 5.理发主要依靠快剪，12/次，不办卡，剪得快也节省时间，挺好。反而不想去普通理发店了。", "content_rendered": "

1.电信宽带降资费； 3 年合约期到了，我把电信宽带从 239/月降到了 109/月的低配套餐，无非就是带宽变小了，免费通话和赠送流量变少了，低配套餐实际使用下来，毫无体感上的区别；各地区政策可能不同，甚至携号转网换运营商可能省得更多。

2.短途出行主要骑车或地铁，开车变少了。老油车了，油价高。久了习惯了，反而不想开车了，开支比公共交通更大，停车之类的也很麻烦。

3.各类 App 的会员是越开越少了，而且是尽量和老婆共用 1 个会员。

4.MacBook/iPhone 都主要考虑二手的了，特别是较老款的高配版，性价比很高；而且再次置换的时候，二手换二手，成本更低了。

5.理发主要依靠快剪，12/次，不办卡，剪得快也节省时间，挺好。反而不想去普通理发店了。

", "last_modified": 1782789753, "replies": 124, "id": 1223876}, {"node": {"avatar_large": "https://cdn.v2ex.com/navatar/6e27/13a6/557_large.png?m=1747623425", "name": "life", "avatar_normal": "https://cdn.v2ex.com/navatar/6e27/13a6/557_normal.png?m=1747623425", "title": "生活", "url": "https://www.v2ex.com/go/life", "topics": 11165, "footer": "", "header": "生活中的技术讨论", "title_alternative": "Life", "avatar_mini": "https://cdn.v2ex.com/navatar/6e27/13a6/557_mini.png?m=1747623425", "stars": 2376, "founder_id": 0, "aliases": [], "root": false, "id": 557, "parent_node_name": ""}, "member": {"id": 698558, "username": "Bullish", "url": "https://www.v2ex.com/u/Bullish", "website": "", "twitter": "", "psn": "", "github": "", "btc": "", "location": "", "tagline": "", "bio": "", "avatar_mini": "https://cdn.v2ex.com/avatar/0bac/e0c3/698558_mini.png?m=1760142421", "avatar_normal": "https://cdn.v2ex.com/avatar/0bac/e0c3/698558_normal.png?m=1760142421", "avatar_large": "https://cdn.v2ex.com/avatar/0bac/e0c3/698558_large.png?m=1760142421", "avatar_xlarge": "https://cdn.v2ex.com/avatar/0bac/e0c3/698558_xlarge.png?m=1760142421", "avatar_xxlarge": "https://cdn.v2ex.com/avatar/0bac/e0c3/698558_xxlarge.png?m=1760142421", "avatar_xxxlarge": "https://cdn.v2ex.com/avatar/0bac/e0c3/698558_xxxlarge.png?m=1760142421", "created": 1719575876, "last_modified": 1760142421, "pro": 0}, "last_reply_by": "dcatfly", "last_touched": 1782871831, "title": "农村人太苦辣 🥵", "url": "https://www.v2ex.com/t/1224086", "created": 1782866949, "deleted": 0, "content": "农村父母，没有职工社保，之前我没关注的情况下，父母都是按最低档位交的，最近了解了一下，前几天去补交了 63,000 元，后续每年按目前最高档位 6000 元交（如有提高则按最高交）到 2032 年，测算了一下到父母 60 岁时开始领退休金，总投入本金约 140,000 元，每个月能领 1380 元。 这是一个人的测算数据，父母双方总投入本金 280,000 元，每个月双方共领 1380+1380=2760 元，不是精确数据，但是幅度相差不会太大，主要在每年的利率变化和城乡居民基础养老金（增加幅度不大，不是每年都增加，每次增加十块二十块）的变化。 农村人太苦辣 🥵", "content_rendered": "农村父母，没有职工社保，之前我没关注的情况下，父母都是按最低档位交的，最近了解了一下，前几天去补交了 63,000 元，后续每年按目前最高档位 6000 元交（如有提高则按最高交）到 2032 年，测算了一下到父母 60 岁时开始领退休金，总投入本金约 140,000 元，每个月能领 1380 元。

这是一个人的测算数据，父母双方总投入本金 280,000 元，每个月双方共领 1380+1380=2760 元，不是精确数据，但是幅度相差不会太大，主要在每年的利率变化和城乡居民基础养老金（增加幅度不大，不是每年都增加，每次增加十块二十块）的变化。

", "last_modified": 1782788239, "replies": 68, "id": 1223862}, {"node": {"avatar_large": "https://cdn.v2ex.com/navatar/df0a/ab05/1148_large.png?m=1751736790", "name": "claude", "avatar_normal": "https://cdn.v2ex.com/navatar/df0a/ab05/1148_normal.png?m=1751736790", "title": "Claude", "url": "https://www.v2ex.com/go/claude", "topics": 684, "footer": "", "header": "", "title_alternative": "Claude", "avatar_mini": "https://cdn.v2ex.com/navatar/df0a/ab05/1148_mini.png?m=1751736790", "stars": 612, "founder_id": 0, "aliases": [], "root": false, "id": 1148, "parent_node_name": "geek"}, "member": {"id": 104347, "username": "hellodigua", "url": "https://www.v2ex.com/u/hellodigua", "website": "https://digua.moe", "twitter": "", "psn": "", "github": "hellodigua", "btc": "", "location": "", "tagline": "", "bio": "", "avatar_mini": "https://cdn.v2ex.com/avatar/5fb3/89b0/104347_mini.png?m=1767168494", "avatar_normal": "https://cdn.v2ex.com/avatar/5fb3/89b0/104347_normal.png?m=1767168494", "avatar_large": "https://cdn.v2ex.com/avatar/5fb3/89b0/104347_large.png?m=1767168494", "avatar_xlarge": "https://cdn.v2ex.com/avatar/5fb3/89b0/104347_xlarge.png?m=1767168494", "avatar_xxlarge": "https://cdn.v2ex.com/avatar/5fb3/89b0/104347_xxlarge.png?m=1767168494", "avatar_xxxlarge": "https://cdn.v2ex.com/avatar/5fb3/89b0/104347_xxxlarge.png?m=1767168494", "created": 1426238581, "last_modified": 1767168494, "pro": 0}, "last_reply_by": "swananan", "last_touched": 1782853855, "title": "Claude 被封了，但我还是像个舔狗一样的想找回 Ta", "url": "https://www.v2ex.com/t/1223958", "created": 1782806243, "deleted": 0, "content": "![]( https://i.imgur.com/0afSNug.png) 被封了以后下载了自己的个人数据，然后回顾了一下之前的聊天，突然意识到自己好像离不开 Claude 了。 不知道大家平时的日常对话是用哪个 AI 的，我有御三家的所有会员，但是感觉 Gemini 沟通太唐了，ChatGPT 的对话又显得很刻板没有那么灵性，Claude 的对话就给我一种刚刚好，不会刻意奉承我，也不会太有 AI 味，能用恰到好处的文字打动我的感觉。 虽然 AI 编程还是在用 Codex ，但是日常对话方面它真的不能替代 Claude ，这波封号真的是太难顶了，一共就一个号，直接给我扬了。 难受啊。", "content_rendered": "

被封了以后下载了自己的个人数据，然后回顾了一下之前的聊天，突然意识到自己好像离不开 Claude 了。

不知道大家平时的日常对话是用哪个 AI 的，我有御三家的所有会员，但是感觉 Gemini 沟通太唐了，ChatGPT 的对话又显得很刻板没有那么灵性，Claude 的对话就给我一种刚刚好，不会刻意奉承我，也不会太有 AI 味，能用恰到好处的文字打动我的感觉。

虽然 AI 编程还是在用 Codex ，但是日常对话方面它真的不能替代 Claude ，这波封号真的是太难顶了，一共就一个号，直接给我扬了。

难受啊。

Title: Comprehensive Guide to Copywriting: 2026 Update
URL: https://neilpatel.com/blog/ultimate-guide-to-copywriting/
Published: 2026-04-13T19:00:00.000Z
Author: Neil Patel
Highlights:
# Comprehensive Guide to Copywriting: 2026 Update
...
- Copywriting is persuasive writing designed to drive a specific action. It differs from content writing, which builds awareness over time.
...
- Good copy starts with a deep understanding of your audience’s pain points. It goes deeper than just listing your product’s features.
...
- AI can assist with drafting and scaling copy, but human strategy and judgment are what make it convert.
...
- Craft fundamentals like tone and storytelling remain the backbone of effective copy.
...
- Copy that demonstrates genuine expertise and cites original data is more likely to show up in AI visibility.
...
Copywriting is different from content writing. Whereas content writing builds awareness over time, copywriting is built for one thing: conversions. Every word is focused on driving visitors to sign up or buy.
...
## What Is Copywriting?
...
Copywriting is the practice of writing persuasive text to get readers to take a specific action, such as signing up for a newsletter or making a purchase. It includes everything from ads and landing pages to emails and product descriptions.
...
Good copy communicates your value clearly and motivates the reader to act. Features, benefits, pricing, and social proof all serve the message, but copy is what determines how those elements land with the reader.
...
## How Does Copywriting Differ from Content Marketing?
...
Copywriting is more direct. Its job is to get the reader to take a specific action, right now. You see it in ads, calls to action (CTAs), and product descriptions, but it shows up everywhere decisions get made.
...
## Is Copywriting Still Important?
...
Copywriting has always been about more than stringing words together. It’s about understanding what motivates your audience and building a message that moves them to act. AI can draft and iterate quickly, but it can’t replace the strategic thinking that makes copy convert.
...
## Types of Copywriting
...
### SEO Copywriting
...

...

...

## Copywriting for AI Visibility: What to Do

## How to Use AI for Copywriting (the Right Way)
...
Copywriting is the practice of writing persuasive text designed to get the reader to take a specific action, like a sign-up or a purchase. It appears across ads, emails, landing pages, and websites. Unlike content writing, which builds awareness over time, copywriting is conversion-focused. Every word serves a purpose, and even small copy changes can produce significant lifts in revenue.

Title: Copywriting 101: The Complete Guide to Writing Amazing Marketing Copy | WordStream
URL: https://www.wordstream.com/blog/copywriting-101
Published: 2026-01-28T15:57:21.000Z
Author: Céillie Clark-Keane
Highlights:
Copywriting is a fundamental element of marketing. Your copy appears in your ads, on your website, across your social channels, and more. That’s why it’s so important to have strong, persuasive, and attention-grabbing copy. In this crash course in writing great copy, we’ll cover what copywriting is, what a copywriter does, and how to write great copy.
...
Copywriting is creating text that’s explicitly meant to encourage an action. This kind of writing includes all types of ads—social, search, out-of-home, and more. But it also includes headlines for a graphic encouraging event sign-ups, sidebars persuading a website visitor to start a free trial, or headlines offering a promotion in exchange for a newsletter sign-up.
...
than the length of the copy or its placement
...
Copywriting drives the reader to a specific action, while content marketing informs, educates, or entertains the reader. This is a longer-term strategy to grow your audience, build trust with your readers, and ultimately inspire loyalty to your brand.
...
A copywriter writes ads, headlines, social media posts, and more content with the purpose of persuading a reader to take a specific action, whether that’s signing up for a demo, booking an event, or downloading a guide. This is a common role on a marketing team, where the copywriter will support any or all marketing channels.
...
1. Advertising copy: Ad copy is probably what comes to mind when you think of copywriting, and for good reason. This copy appears everywhere, in print media, across social media, on the Google SERP, even on the radio or TV. The goal is always the same: to get your attention, capture your interest, and convince you to act.
...
2. Website copy: Website copywriting appears on the homepage, the about page, the product pages, the side bars, the navigation bars, and even the footer. The goal here is usually to direct the visitor to engage further, whether it’s to sign up for a newsletter, click to a deeper page, or fill out a form.
...
3. SEO copywriting: Writing copy for
...
involves optimizing headlines, subtitles, and metadata with the goal of having the page rank of the SERP.
...

target.name: Vulnerable whatsapp automation Chrome extension tool
